svg.title: Data Warehouse Pipeline — Medallion Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end Medallion Architecture pipeline: CRM and ERP CSV sources load into Bronze raw tables, transform through Silver cleaning, model into Gold star schema, delivered to BI, SQL and ML consumers.
svg.text: · Gold layer as ML feature store
Loknadh_Kona · SQL Data Warehouse · Medallion Architecture · github.com/KrishnaSai315
